brand.name: CryptoNews
brand.description: Your global authority for real-time cryptocurrency news, blockchain updates, and expert market analysis. Stay informed with the pulse of the crypto world on CryptoNews.

contact_page.hero_desc: Whether it's a partnership proposal, a copyright concern, or just a kind word — our inbox is always open.
contact_page.opt1_desc: Questions about the platform, partnerships, or media requests.
contact_page.opt2_desc: Report content that violates your copyright or intellectual property.
contact_page.opt3_desc: Found a bug or need help with the platform? Let us know.
contact_page.placeholder_message: Tell us how we can help you...
contact_page.success_desc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy_page.hero_desc: We believe in radical transparency. Here's exactly what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it.
privacy_page.tldr: CryptoNews collects minimal data, never sells it, uses it only to improve your experience, and you can request deletion at any time. We're an independent platform with no investors or advertisers — your trust is our only asset.
privacy_page.s1_content:
We collect minimal data necessary to operate CryptoNews. This includes:

• Usage Data: Pages visited, time spent, browser type, device type, and IP address (anonymized).
• Preferences: Language selection and reading preferences stored in your browser locally.
• Voluntary Data: If you contact us, we collect your name and email address solely to respond to your inquiry.

We do NOT collect passwords, payment information, or any sensitive personal data.
privacy_page.s2_content:
The information we collect is used strictly to:

• Deliver and improve the CryptoNews platform and user experience.
• Analyze aggregate traffic patterns to optimize content delivery.
• Respond to support requests or inquiries you send us.
• Ensure platform security and prevent abuse.

We do NOT sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy_page.s3_content:
CryptoNews uses minimal cookies and local storage for:

• Language preference (locale) — stored locally in your browser.
• Session analytics — anonymized and aggregated, never linked to you personally.

You may disable cookies via your browser settings at any time.
privacy_page.s4_content:
CryptoNews may use the following third-party services:

• Hosting & CDN providers for content delivery.
• Analytics tools (anonymized) to understand platform usage.
• News source APIs for aggregating cryptocurrency news content.

Each third-party provider has their own privacy policy. We do not share personally identifiable information with these providers.
privacy_page.s5_content:
CryptoNews aggregates news from various public sources. All original content belongs to their respective owners. We link back to original sources and do not claim ownership of third-party articles.

If you believe your copyrighted content has been used improperly, please contact us at copyright@cryptonews.com and we will address your concern promptly — typically within 48 hours.
privacy_page.s6_content:
You have the right to:

• Access any personal data we hold about you.
• Request deletion of your data from our systems.
• Opt-out of any analytics or tracking at any time.
• Contact us with any privacy-related concerns.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at support@cryptonews.com. We will respond within 7 business days.
privacy_page.s7_content:
We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect any data we hold. CryptoNews uses HTTPS encryption for all data in transit.

However, no system is 100% secure. We encourage you to use strong passwords and to contact us immediately if you suspect any unauthorized access.
privacy_page.s8_content: CryptoNews is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will delete it immediately.
privacy_page.s9_content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will indicate the Last Updated date at the top of this page. Continued use of CryptoNews after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy_page.s10_content:
If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy:

Email: privacy@cryptonews.com
Response time: Within 48 hours

We take your privacy seriously.
privacy_page.cta_desc: Our privacy policy is meant to be read and understood. If anything is unclear, please reach out.

errors.not_found_desc: This page may have been removed or the link is incorrect.

whale_tracker.title: Crypto Whale Tracker
whale_tracker.description: Real-time large transaction monitor across Bitcoin, Ethereum & 50+ blockchains.
whale_tracker.engine_desc: Our proprietary Whale Monitoring engine uses real-time node data to track large-scale movements.

launchpad.title: Crypto Launchpad & Token Sales
launchpad.description: Discover and track the most promising blockchain startups in Active stage.
launchpad.explore_desc: Explore all cryptocurrencies, tokens, and blockchain projects.

about_page.hero_desc: CryptoNews was born from a simple idea — everyone deserves access to fast, accurate, and unbiased cryptocurrency news. No paywalls. No bias. Just the truth about the decentralized world shaping our future.
about_page.mission_desc1: We aggregate and translate cryptocurrency news from the world's top sources, making it accessible in over 12 languages. Whether you're in Karachi, Moscow, or São Paulo — you deserve to understand the financial revolution happening around you.
about_page.mission_desc2: Built by a single developer with zero funding, CryptoNews proves that passion and technology can build something truly global. Every feature, every translation, every update — handcrafted with care.
about_page.quote: "Fast. Accurate. Global. That's the CryptoNews promise."
about_page.val1_desc: Breaking crypto news delivered within minutes of happening — no delays, no filters.
about_page.val2_desc: Available in 12+ languages so every reader gets crypto news in their native tongue.
about_page.val3_desc: This platform was built solo with zero funding — powered by passion and late nights.
about_page.val4_desc: Independent journalism. We report facts, not sponsored narratives or paid promotions.
about_page.cta_desc: Running CryptoNews costs real money. If this platform has helped you, consider supporting it so we can keep the servers running and content flowing.

banner.donate_disc: I’m a student developing this platform with zero funding. Your support helps me manage server costs, improve features, and continue delivering reliable updates every day.
banner.thanks: Thank you for supporting independent journalism.

seo.title: Crypto News Today | Latest Bitcoin & Altcoin Market Updates
seo.description: Stay updated with real-time crypto news, market analysis, and blockchain events. Your global source for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and DeFi updates.
